sizing_rule.note: Add trading units progressively as equity crosses per-unit capital thresholds ($500, $1500, $2500, $7500, $30000). Requires positive track record (≥1 winning trade) at previous unit count before scaling up. Max 8 units total.

source_rule_text: Increase the number of trading units progressively as account equity grows, scaling position count in discrete steps tied to per-unit capital thresholds.
